templates.name: AWS Cost Explorer by HTTP
templates.description:
The template gets AWS Cost Explorer metrics and uses the script item to make HTTP requests to the Cost Explorer API.
The Cost Explorer API can access the historical data over up to 12 months and the data for current month.
Don't forget to read the README.md for the correct setup of the template.

You can discuss this template or leave feedback on our forum https://www.zabbix.com/forum/zabbix-suggestions-and-feedback

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"

config.label: Access key ID
config.description: Access keys are long-term credentials for an IAM user.

macros.description: ARN assume role; add when using the `assume_role` authorization method.

config.label: ARN assume role
config.description: The ARN of the role to assume when using the assume_role method.

macros.description: Add when using the `assume_role` through instance metadata or environment authorization method. Possible values: `false`, `true`.

config.label: Assume Role Metadata Authorization
config.description: Chose `True` when use instance metadata service to retrieve role credentials.

macros.description: Filter of discoverable discovered billing service by name.

config.label: Service Filter (Matches)
config.description: A regex pattern to include services in discovery.

macros.description: Filter to exclude discovered billing service by name.

config.label: Service Filter (Not Matches)
config.description: A regex pattern to exclude services from discovery.

macros.description: Months to get historical data from AWS Cost Explore API, no more than 12 months.

config.label: Billing Month
config.description: The number of months to retrieve historical billing data (maximum 12). In the range from 1 to 12 inclusive.

config.label: Billing Region
config.description: The AWS region for billing data retrieval.

macros.description: Sets HTTP proxy value. If this macro is empty, then no proxy is used.

config.label: HTTP Proxy
config.description: HTTP proxy to use for requests.

config.label: Secret access key
config.description: Secret access key can be retrieved only at the time you create it.

macros.description: Region used in assume role request.

config.label: STS Region
config.description: The AWS region for the assume role request.
